title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
author: Doyle, Arthur Conan
summary: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson investigate the legend of a diabolical hound haunting the Baskerville family on Dartmoor. Dr. James Mortimer seeks Holmes’s help after Sir Charles Baskerville’s mysterious death and the arrival of Sir Henry, the new heir. Watson is sent to protect Sir Henry at Baskerville Hall and to observe local suspects: the secretive Stapletons, the Barrymores, and strange moorland figures. The case weaves folklore, a treacherous mire, an escaped convict, and scientific deduction. Holmes’s remote manipulations culminate in revealing a human plot to exploit the legend with a savage hound as instrument of murder and moral reckoning.

characters.name: Sherlock Holmes
characters.lifespan: survives; solves the case and exposes the perpetrators

characters.name: Dr. John H. Watson
characters.lifespan: survives; acts as Holmes’s agent on Dartmoor and narrates events

characters.name: Dr. James Mortimer
characters.lifespan: survives; brings the case to Holmes and assists the investigation

characters.name: Sir Charles Baskerville
characters.lifespan: dead before main action; found dead on the moor under mysterious circumstances

characters.name: Sir Henry Baskerville
characters.lifespan: survives after being protected; targeted by the plot

characters.name: Mr. Stapleton (Jack Stapleton)
characters.lifespan: dies (perishes on the moor / in the Grimpen Mire) after his scheme is uncovered

characters.name: Beryl Stapleton (Beryl Vandeleur)
characters.lifespan: survives; reveals critical information about Stapleton

characters.name: Mr. Barrymore
characters.lifespan: survives; his secret signaling and connection to the escaped convict are exposed

characters.name: Mrs. Barrymore
characters.personality: sombre, secretive, loyal to household ties
characters.lifespan: survives; implicated in aiding the escaped convict and later revealed

characters.name: Selden (the convict)
characters.lifespan: dies on the moor (killed during events on the moor)

characters.name: Laura Lyons
characters.lifespan: survives; provides testimony important to the case

characters.name: Sir Hugo Baskerville
characters.lifespan: dead (legendary ancestor whose curse is recounted)

characters.name: Cartwright (Baker Street boy)
characters.lifespan: survives; assists Watson under Holmes’s orders

locations.name: Grimpen Mire (fictional area on Dartmoor, referred in book)
Merripit House (fictional, Merripit is on the moor)
Charing Cross Hospital (London, referenced in directory)
Haslemere / Hindhead (signature location of author in book front matter)
